text: Install the JavaScript SDK: npm install @acme/sdk@1.2.3

Install the JavaScript SDK v2: npm install @acme/sdk@2.0.0
Note: v2 contains breaking changes. See the migration guide.
Install the Python SDK: pip install acme-sdk==1.4.0

Install the Python SDK v2: pip install acme-sdk==2.0.0
Python 3.9+ required. The v1 package (acme-sdk<2.0) reaches end-of-life December 2024.
Authenticate all API requests by including your API key in the Authorization header: Authorization: Bearer <your-api-key>
Generate API keys from your dashboard: Settings → API → Create Key. Keys never expire.
API rate limit: 100 requests per minute per API key. Exceeding the limit returns HTTP 429 Too Many Requests.
Pro and Enterprise plans support up to 1000 requests per minute per API key. Starter plan is limited to 100 requests per minute.
Query records: const results = await client.query({ filter: { status: 'active' } });
All SDK methods return Promises. Use async/await or .then()/.catch() for error handling.
The SDK ships full TypeScript definitions. No @types package needed.
Batch operations: process up to 100 records in a single call using client.batch(ops). Reduces API round-trips and counts as a single request against your rate limit.
